title: Migrate Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow pipelines from legacy publishing mode is generally available
body:
Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow has a legacy publishing mode that only allowed publishing to a single catalog and schema. The default publishing mode enables publishing to multiple catalogs and schemas. Migration from the legacy publishing mode to the default publishing mode is now generally available (issues encountered in the previous release of this feature have been fixed).

See [Enable the default publishing mode in a pipeline](/aws/en/ldp/migrate-to-dpm).

ref_links.text: Enable the default publishing mode in a pipeline
